title: Ceremonial Beast

moves.title: Stun
effects: Stunned — no action taken; must complete before transitioning

move_pattern: Starts with Stamp (applies 160 Plow to self), then Plow repeating indefinitely. When PlowPower expires or is removed, the beast becomes Stunned for one mandatory turn, then transitions to phase 2: Beast Cry → Stomp → Crush → Beast Cry (cycling).
notes: Two-phase fight. Phase 1: Stamp applies 160 stacks of PlowPower, then Plow loops indefinitely — dealing 20 damage and gaining 2 Strength each use. When PlowPower expires naturally or is stripped by the player, SetStunned() is called by the power, forcing the state machine into the Stun move (immobilized for one mandatory turn with MustPerformOnceBeforeTransitioning). Phase 2: Cycles Beast Cry (applies 1 Ringing to the player) → Stomp (17 damage) → Crush (19 damage + 4 Strength) → Beast Cry indefinitely. Removing PlowPower early triggers the phase transition sooner.
